name: FRANKLIN ELECTRIC CO INC
summary: PART I Description of the Business Franklin Electric Co., Inc. (Franklin Electric or the Company) is an Indiana corporation founded in 1944 and incorporated in 1946. Named after Americas pioneer electrical engineer, Benjamin Franklin, Franklin Electric manufactured the first water-lubricated submersible motor for water systems and the first submersible motor for fueling systems. With 2025 revenue of approximately $2.1 billion, the Company designs, manufactures and distributes water and fuel pump...
